raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Backend-Rust/src/routes/pr: Streaming Gemini Vertex->AI Studio heal telemetry now derives its Recovered/Exhausted outcome from the upstream HTTP status (a testable stream_heal_outcome helper) instead of send-success, matching the non-streaming provider-switch telemetry; adds a unit test. +3 for the test-module clippy::unwrap_used allow scoping the crate deny to production code.
